textByHash.03a0be3fcd24c5431dee0a57e9aa01eb0d638009: Yer stupid elephant! I'll tell yer again! Yer need to be entering the shed in the middle of the swamp while holding a dramenwood staff! Yer can make the Dramen staff
textByHash.1e502a24ce23c5ddf0a8063671b2be5592a83ba9: Well you'll have to be catchin' me again when yer are, elephant!
textByHash.4b8a9c998e86acccf9a1c8a6a4f577c5244ebec8: The monks are running a ship from Port Sarim to Entrana, I hear too. Now leave me alone yer elephant!
textByHash.5df9fd689abba29c84c08128a5a2a250ba012967: Zanaris is it now? Well well well... Yer'll be needing to be going to that funny little shed out there in the swamp, so you will.
textByHash.888bffeaae3cab6db1be5f8313ea05b1dd681bc6: Hey! Yer big elephant! Don't go choppin' down me house, now!
textByHash.8a46c95a0d66d16692dece246a4e011add94bba2: Dramenwood staffs are crafted from branches of the Dramen tree, so they are. I hear there's a Dramen tree over on the island of Entrana in a cave
textByHash.8a53212e4999b4842a6c6774a72a95aae5e04308: Ay yer big elephant! Yer've caught me, to be sure! What would an elephant like yer be wanting wid ol' Shamus then?
textByHash.910f548d0cd431bbd35d46e8cab96b56a080db3e: or some such. There would probably be a good place for an elephant like yer to be starting looking I reckon.
textByHash.aa818a015c5c2e525fd8378d5f04c63c96827bec: from a dramen tree branch, and there's a Dramen tree on Entrana! Now leave me alone yer great elephant!
textByHash.d0076991154c1edb53d19bd3ee3669b76e7d90b4: Ha! Look at yer! Look at the stupid elephant who tries to go catching a leprechaun when he don't even be knowing what he wants!
textByHash.f431ab5c80fa6a2c43421a0e65d1e5461a0f9564: Ah yer stupid elephant! The city isn't IN the shed! The doorway to the shed is being a portal to Zanaris, so it is.
textByHash.fd143797c622da5f6107550af95178e6041aa63d: Oh, was I fergetting to say? Yer need to be carrying a Dramenwood staff to be getting there! Otherwise Yer'll just be ending up in the shed.
